meaning: n.[医]囊切开术,被膜切开术 晶状体切开术
examples: And nd: YAG laser posterior capsulotomy can improve the visual functions of both types of PCO patients.
Objective To observe the morbidity of posterior capsule opacification (PCO) of modified envelope capsulotomy.
METHODS Children performed cataract extraction were divided into integrated posterior capsule group and posterior capsulotomy group.
